case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. MARIA DEL CARMEN ROMALDO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,338.02 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT ROMALDO, MARIA DEL CARMEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-14-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $40.00) SERVED APR-01-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ROMALDO, MARIA DEL CARMEN

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT MARIA DEL CARMEN ROMALDO IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
